channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Mobile AI opens new horizons for sustainable business growth in the digital age
item.description: As we navigate through 2024 and gear up for 2025, we are witnessing a pivotal moment in technological evolution where two transformative forces—5.5G (also referred to as 5G-Advanced or 5G-A) networks and artificial intelligence (AI)—are converging to reshape our digital landscape.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Gemini is coming to supercharge Google Assistant on smart displays and speakers – and here's how it will work
item.description: Google Assistant is continuing its work on Nest devices, but Gemini is going to be lending a helping hand.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Musk makes new antitrust claims against OpenAI
item.description: Elon Musk added new antitrust claims to his lawsuit against OpenAI on Thursday, accusing the ChatGPT maker of colluding with Microsoft to block competition from other artificial intelligence (AI) companies.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: State of IT jobs: Mixed signals, changes ahead
item.description: When it comes to jobs and hiring, the IT industry today is in a state of flux, with unprecedented growth in certain areas — such as AI and ML — alongside massive layoffs from tech vendors and cooling (or even contracting) salaries for a wide range of IT roles.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: What Gen Zers on TikTok mean when they say they’re ‘crashing out’ over Trump’s election
item.description: Another word has entered the internet lexicon, and it couldn’t be more timely. If you keep seeing people “crashing out” online, you are not alone.
item.dc:creator: Eve Upton-Clark, Fast Company

item.title: Apple’s iPhone partners make plans for US manufacturing
item.description: In a sign of the times, Apple’s key manufacturing partners are ready to ramp up production in the US should the incoming Trump administration keep its promise to levy painful surcharges on Chinese imports.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: FBI probe into Chinese hacking finds 'broad and significant' espionage campaign
item.description: The U.S. government's ongoing probe into China-backed actors' attempts to hack into U.S. telecommunications infrastructure revealed a "broad and significant" espionage campaign targeted at those in government or political work, the FBI announced Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Understanding Hyperlight, Microsoft’s minimal VM manager
item.description: Virtualization seemed to be one of those technologies that was done. With Hyper-V, VMware, and KVM all offering similar features and performance, all that was left to do was to support new chipset instructions and fix bugs.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: FBI, CISA say Chinese hackers breached multiple US telecom providers in targeted attack
item.description: The U.S. government said it is investigating after People's Republic of China hackers targeted commercial telecommunications service providers in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Elon Musk says he and Trump have 'mandate to delete' regulations. Ethics laws could limit Musk role
item.description: In picking billionaire Elon Musk to be “our cost cutter” for the U.S. government, President-elect Donald Trump won't be the first American president to empower a business tycoon to look for ways to dramatically cut federal regulations. President Ronald Reagan tapped J.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and TOM KRISHER, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: OpenAI’s SimpleQA tool for discerning genAI accuracy — right message, wrong messenger
item.description: In the ongoing and potentially futile effort by CIOs to squeeze meaningful ROI out of their shiny, new generative AI (genAI) tools, there is no more powerful villain than hallucinations. It is what causes everyone to seriously wonder whether the analysis genAI delivers is valid and usable.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Red Hat Developer Hub adds AI templates
item.description: Red Hat Developer Hub, an enterprise-grade internal developer portal for platform engineering teams, is adding enhancements for AI, with five templates for building AI-powered applications for common use cases.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Servicemember comes full-circle: Serving our nation as an Army sergeant, VA training specialist on the Digital GI Bill
item.description: Together, we can make sure that as veterans transition to civilian life, it opens doors to new opportunities and ways to thrive. The post Servicemember comes full-circle: Serving our nation as an Army sergeant, VA training specialist on the Digital GI Bill first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Japan's SoftBank returns to profit after gains at Vision Fund and other investments
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japanese technology group SoftBank swung back to profitability in the July-September quarter, boosted by positive results in its Vision Fund investments. Tokyo-based SoftBank Group Corp.
item.dc:creator: YURI KAGEYAMA, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Heroes among us: Celebrating American bravery on Veterans Day
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson helps you honor our heroes with these powerful podcasts, audiobooks and documentaries this Veterans Day.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Avoiding Siri slipups and apologies for butt dials
item.description: Voice assistants may cause confusion across devices. Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson offers some solutions to fix it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
